__localization_translator_list__: Localization Translator List (GitHub Profile Name: Display Nickname)
__localization_translator_list_end__: This is the end marker for the localization translator list. Please do not delete this line.
administrator_protection_is_enabled: Administrator Protection is enabled, some features will be disabled. Please disable Administrator Protection and restart Windows to continue.
operating_system_is_not_windows_nt_based: The current operating system is not Windows NT-based. The program will not run.
program_is_not_running_as_administrator: MSPCManagerHelper is not running as an administrator. Some features will be disabled. Please select Run as Administrator from the Home Page to continue.
windows_server_installation_type_is_core: The current Windows Server installation type is not Windows Server with Desktop Experience. Some features will be disabled. Please reinstall Windows Server with Desktop Experience to continue.
